title: Industrial Precision Mold Factory - CNC Machining with H13 Steel
outcome: Achieved ±0.015mm precision, 30% shorter processing time, 0.5% rework rate, 15% cost reduction per mold.
prompt_sdxl: Ultra-realistic industrial CNC machining, H13 steel mold factory, cinematic lighting, blue steel tone, high precision mechanical detail
